News & Events

April 17, 2024
EVENTS

Annual Gala Supporting Adolescent Health

Join Community Medical Centers for A Black & White Masquerade, an elegant evening of dining, dancing, and live and silent auctions in support of adolescent health. Your ticket helps advance CMC’s new Adolescent Health Center in downtown Stockton.

PATIENT STORIES

CMC Respite Center and Tuleburg Press partner to help patients heal through journaling

CMC’s Respite Center, in partnership with Tuleburg Press, introduced a therapeutic journaling program to help patients recovering from substance-use disorder express emotions, process trauma, and rebuild confidence and self-awareness through writing.

Epic Changes at CMC | We're upgrading to serve you better

COMMUNITY

April 17, 2024
NEWS

Honoring Our Roots on Farmworkers Day

March 26, 2026
COMMUNITY

Juan Lopez Solorza, MD: Making an impact in the city where he grew up

One year after joining Community Medical Centers as Associate Medical Director of the Family Medicine Residency Clinic at Channel, Stockton native Dr. Juan Lopez Solorza is making a lasting impact on both residents and patients. Known to colleagues as Dr. JLS, he’s helping future physicians strengthen their connections to the community through compassionate, hands-on care. The Family Medicine Residency Program, operated by Dignity Health St. Joseph’s Medical Center in partnership with CMC, provides residents with essential clinical experience — with CMC serving as their primary outpatient continuity clinic.

October 22, 2025
PATIENT STORIES

Mom finds support she needs for teen on the autism spectrum

March 26, 2026
NEWS

Open House to Introduce Manteca Recovery Center

Community Medical Centers (CMC) is hosting an Open House on Wednesday, Aug. 27, from 3 p.m. to 5 p.m. at CMC Manteca, 200 Cottage Ave., to introduce the new Manteca Recovery Center. The center will provide outpatient sobering services and Substance Use Disorder (SUD) treatment, expanding recovery care for patients in Manteca and beyond.
